home.heroSubtitle: A production-grade React starter with React Router, Zustand, and react-hook-form — typed, layered, and ready to ship.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to ship a real product
home.featuresSubtitle: A pragmatic toolkit composed of battle-tested libraries — no lock-in, no magic.
home.featureRouterBody: File-system-free, fully typed routes that scale as your app grows.
home.featureZustandBody: Slice-style stores with localStorage persistence for auth.
home.featureFormsBody: Uncontrolled inputs, minimal re-renders, accessible error messages.
home.featureTailwindBody: Tokens via @theme, dark mode out of the box, zero config.
home.featureModulesBody: Auth, Dashboard and Public each own their pages, hooks and stores.
home.featureTypescriptBody: Catch errors at compile time, ship with confidence.

slide1.headline:
Your Package,
Delivered On Time.
slide1.subheading: From same-day city deliveries to nationwide shipping — Fast Courier gets your parcels where they need to be, fast and safely.

slide2.headline:
We Deliver
Every Corner of BD.
slide2.subheading: Our growing network spans all 64 districts of Bangladesh. Whether urban or rural, your shipment reaches its destination without a hassle.

slide3.headline:
Send With Confidence,
Every Time.
slide3.subheading: Every shipment is insured, real-time tracked and handled with care. Build your e-commerce business on a courier partner you can trust.

howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.item1Desc: Schedule a pickup from your location and we'll deliver it to the destination on time, every time.
howItWorks.item2Desc: We collect payment on your behalf and transfer it directly to your account — hassle-free.
howItWorks.item3Desc: Drop your parcel at any of our 500+ hubs across Bangladesh for quick processing and dispatch.
howItWorks.item4Desc: Custom bulk delivery solutions tailored for small businesses and large enterprises alike.

ourServices.title: Our Services
ourServices.subtitle: Enjoy fast, reliable parcel delivery with real-time tracking and zero hassle. From personal packages to business shipments — we deliver on time, every time.
ourServices.service1Desc: We deliver parcels within 24–72 hours in Dhaka, Chittagong, Sylhet, Khulna, and Rajshahi. Express delivery available in Dhaka within 4–6 hours from pick-up to drop-off.
ourServices.service2Desc: We deliver parcels nationwide with home delivery in every district, ensuring your products reach customers within 48–72 hours.
ourServices.service3Desc: We also offer customized service with inventory management support, online order processing, packaging, and after sales support.
ourServices.service4Desc: 100% cash on delivery anywhere in Bangladesh with guaranteed safety of your product.
ourServices.service5Desc: Customized corporate services which includes warehouse and inventory management support.
ourServices.service6Desc: Through our reverse logistics facility we allow end customers to return or exchange their products with online business merchants.

whatWeOffer.item1Desc: Stay updated in real-time with our live parcel tracking feature. From pick-up to delivery, monitor your shipment's journey and get instant status updates for complete peace of mind.
whatWeOffer.item2Desc: We ensure your parcels are handled with the utmost care and delivered securely to their destination. Our reliable process guarantees safe and damage-free delivery every time.
whatWeOffer.item3Desc: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock to assist you with any questions, updates, or delivery concerns—anytime you need us.

salesTeam.title: We've helped thousands of sales teams

testimonials.title: What our customers are saying
testimonials.description: Trusted by thousands of merchants and individuals across Bangladesh — hear what they have to say about Fast Courier.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faq.description: Have questions? We have answers. Find everything you need to know about our courier services below.

about.title: Built for teams that have to ship
about.subtitle: Enjoy fast, reliable parcel delivery with real-time tracking and zero hassle. From personal packages to business shipments — we deliver on time, every time.
about.valuePredictableBody: Strong typing, strict lint rules, and explicit module boundaries — fewer surprises in code review.
about.valueBoringBody: We pick libraries that are stable, well-documented, and easy to replace. No silver bullets.
about.valueShipsBody: Auth scaffolding, modular routing, theming and forms are wired up so you can focus on your product.
about.howOrganizedP1: The codebase is split into three bounded contexts — auth, dashboard and public — each with their own pages, components, services and stores. A small shared layer (components/ui, hooks, lib, config) holds the building blocks.
about.howOrganizedP2: The router mounts a dynamic layout per route group, so the same layout primitives can be reused or replaced without touching individual pages.
